narrative:
Pickerington City M (precinct in Fairfield County) has 1,256 registered voters, with 58.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.7 percentage points.
